title: Tweaked Netherrack Texture
description: Basically tweaks the new netherrack texture to blend with the old one.
body:
# Tweaked Netherrack Texture

## Information


This pack replaces the *Netherrack, Warped And Crimson Nylium, Nether Gold Ore, and Nether Quartz Ore* to have the old Netherrack texture to blend with the new one.

Currently supported for 1.19.3 (but works perfectly with other versions above 1.8.9)

## 📜 How to Install
Drag the resource pack to the `.minecraft/resourcepacks` folder, enable it, and then you're done!
